allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "GROUPE"\) { Write-Output "OK: hero présent" }; if \($r.Content -match "OBSIDIAN"\) { Write-Output "OK: wordmark présent" } } catch { Write-Output "ERREUR: $_" })

PowerShell("/tertiaire","/optimisation-cee","/obsibat","/apiryon","/contact","/le-groupe","/particuliers","/travaux" | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$_" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "$_ -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$_ -> ERREUR $_" } })
PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null; Write-Output "compiled" } catch { Write-Output "warming: $_" })

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./src/data/company_profile.json'\); console.log\('OK profil:', p.identite.raisonSociale, '| siege:', p.identite.adresse.ville, '| sous-traitant:', p.soustraitants[0].raisonSociale\)")

Bash(node -e "const {chromium}=require\('playwright'\); \(async\(\)=>{const b=await chromium.launch\({headless:true}\); const p=await b.newPage\(\); await p.goto\('about:blank'\); console.log\('Lancement Chromium OK'\); await b.close\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('FAIL:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($p\){ $p.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "port free")
